name: argo-architect
description: A closed-loop architecture control system that enforces strong consistency between ArchiMate architectural intent and real code structure via semantic UML extraction.

chatParticipants.name: argo
chatParticipants.description: Agentic Workflow Orchestrator — closed-loop architecture control between ArchiMate intent and real code.

commands.name: init
commands.description: Full build: generate code from ArchiMate intent, extract semantic UML, judge stitching, and iterate until consistent.

commands.name: evolve
commands.description: Evolve existing architecture: apply delta ArchiMate changes, run anti-corruption checks, and auto-fix violations.

commands.name: baseline
commands.description: Reverse-engineer a legacy codebase into richly annotated semantic UML (X-ray mode).

commands.name: link
commands.description: Build a traceability matrix linking ArchiMate intent components to underlying code classes.
